title: helichrysum elatum var. glutinosum
intro: Helichrysum elatum var. glutinosum, commonly known as a variety of the Everlasting flower, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of inflammation. The therapeutic actions of Helichrysum elatum var. glutinosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Helichrysum elatum var. glutinosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and swelling. Overconsumption of the plant's essential oil may also cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In addition, using the plant in high concentrations or for an extended period can lead to liver damage and interact with medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Helichrysum elatum var. glutinosum for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
